reviews.review_description: Some reason it's up but you hear the lady in the backgrond but you can't see her as it's not loading in.
It is not what it says it is so I wanted to see how people sing and stuff and it is not that and u jave to pick songs that are mostly old

developer_response.body: Thank you for your honest feedback. Do you mind sharing what you thought the app was and how it didn't meet those expectations? We want to ensure that the expectations we set on the store page for VR Singing Club is an accurate reflection of what people experience in the app!
